name: Talisman Energy Inc.
description: Talisman Energy Inc. was a prominent Canadian independent upstream oil and gas company headquartered in Calgary, Alberta. Established in 1993 following the divestment of BP Canada, the company focused on the exploration, development, production, transportation, and marketing of crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids. With a global operational footprint, Talisman maintained significant assets across North America, the North Sea, and Southeast Asia. The company operated as a publicly traded entity until it was acquired by Repsol S.A. in 2015, marking the end of its independent corporate existence.
